title: Haribo Heart Throbs 500 Gram Bag (1/2 Kilo)
features: Ingredients: glucose syrup, sugar, dextrose, gelatine, citric acid, flavourings, fruit and plant concentrates (aronia, blackcurrant, carrot, elderberry, grape, redcurrant, safflower), glazing agents (vegetable oil, beeswax and carnauba wax).
description: Product description Strawberry flavoured jelly hearts with a vanilla foam backing. Ingredients Ingredients: glucose syrup, sugar, dextrose, gelatine, citric acid, flavourings, fruit and plant concentrates (aronia, blackcurrant, carrot, elderberry, grape, redcurrant, safflower), glazing agents (vegetable oil, beeswax and carnauba wax). Directions Open the bag and enjoy the jelly hearts directly. The entire 500g bag can be consumed at once. Suitable for all ages.
